title: Nykaa Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Nykaa Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Nykaa Retail in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Nykaa Retail:
Nykaa Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa Retail!
